haikus.haiku:
Sunny yolks delight,
Whisking dreams in morning light,
Eggs dance in the pan.
Happy #NationalEggDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Joyful laughter rings,
Echoes of hearts intertwine,
Memories replay.
Happy #RepeatDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Sparkling candles glow,
Laughter bubbles like ripe fruit,
Joyful hearts unite.
#HappyBirthdayJosephineBaker from @ClamBakeSanta
